meta.title: Lumière Spa - The art of modern wellness
meta.description: Lumière Spa - A contemporary sanctuary blending signature rituals, expert therapists and pure botanical care. Reserve your private escape today.

hero.subtitle: A contemporary sanctuary where signature rituals, master therapists and pure botanicals come together to restore body and mind.

intro.title: A quiet sanctuary, designed around you
intro.paragraph: Lumière was created for those who treat self-care as a discipline, not a luxury. Every detail — from the architecture of light to the temperature of the towels — is composed to dissolve the noise of the day and return you to yourself.

services.title: Treatments, reimagined
services.subtitle: A curated menu of therapies, each refined over years of practice and tailored to the rhythm of your body.

items.title: Therapeutic Massage
items.description: Thai, Shiatsu and hot-stone work to release tension, restore circulation and quiet the nervous system.

items.title: Facial Rituals
items.description: Intensive botanical facials calibrated to your skin for a luminous, rebalanced complexion.

items.title: Body Therapy
items.description: Full-body exfoliation, wraps and detox rituals for skin that feels soft, firm and renewed.

items.title: Aromatherapy
items.description: Pure essential oils paired with breathwork to bring body and mind back into balance.

experience.title: More than a treatment
experience.description: Arrive early and stay late. The Lumière journey extends well beyond the treatment room.

items.title: Thermal Suite
items.description: Dry and wet saunas designed to detox and deeply relax before your ritual.

items.title: Hydrotherapy
items.description: A private jacuzzi space with warm water and bespoke aromatic blends.

items.title: Stillness Studio
items.description: Daily guided meditation and breathwork in an acoustically calm space.

items.title: Botanical Bar
items.description: 100% natural, paraben-free elixirs and teas crafted in-house.

packages.title: Choose your journey
packages.subtitle: Considered packages that deepen your practice and reward your loyalty.

items.name: Nguyen Minh Anh
items.content: Lumière is where I find stillness amid a relentless schedule. The ritual is faultless, the therapists masterful, the space utterly calming.

items.name: Tran Hoang Long
items.content: The Renewal journey is worth every minute. I left feeling weightless and clear-headed. I'll absolutely be back.

items.name: Le Thu Ha
items.content: The botanical facial visibly brightened my skin. Elegant, immaculate and deeply private — exactly what I needed.

items.name: Pham Quoc Bao
items.content: I send my own patients to Lumière to manage stress. The consistency of the experience is remarkable.

contact.title: Begin your ritual
contact.description: Reserve today and receive 15% off your first journey. Our concierge is ready to compose the perfect experience for you.
